name: 16S_V4_Verrucomicrobia
description: 16S rRNA hypervariable region V4 in phylum Verrucomicrobia. Approximately 106 bp on the E. coli numbering scheme (positions 576-682). Akkermansia-containing phylum, gut mucin degraders. Species- to genus-level discriminating; real biological variation expected — allow high mismatch during mapping.
